name: Advantage Lithium Corp.
description: Advantage Lithium Corp. is a Canada-based resource company focused on the acquisition, exploration, and development of lithium properties. The company's flagship asset is the Cauchari Lithium Project, located in the Jujuy Province of Argentina, in the heart of the lithium triangle. Advantage Lithium is dedicated to developing high-quality lithium brine resources to meet the growing global demand for energy storage and electric vehicle batteries.
